creator: andy@neu.net
text:
FreeBSD FBSD15 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #0 main-n274302-675708aa402a: Mon Dec 16 13:57:15 EST 2024     root@FBSD15:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/MYKERNEL amd64 1500029

On a fresh install, the sound effects tab in Sound Preferences does not work.  It is greyed out and nothing is selectable. 

I have installed:# pkg info | grep canberra
libcanberra-0.30_11            Implementation of the Freedesktop sound theme spec
libcanberra-gtk3-0.30_11       Implementation of the Freedesktop sound theme spec

Is there anything else to configure?
